purpose: settings.parallel_computing left unset on the hello-world program: the knob readback pins the default False (pyreason.py:80) and Program.reason takes the serial optimized kernel — the dispatch at program.py:42-46 checks _parallel_computing first, then _fp_version, then falls through to Interpretation — the default-false-standard class; the baseline twin whose reasoning probe digests parallel-computing-on matched at authoring (the harness judges each case within one knob position).
provenance: spine case against docs/surface.md setting:parallel_computing default-false-standard; hello-world program with the knob readback
